relations.note: Both rules govern the exact typography and legal formatting of the brand name LISRAYA.

quotes: Always write **LISRAYA** in ALL CAPS in all written materials (patient marketing rule; supersedes the Feb 2026 general guide's title-case rule).

rules.intent: Maintain strict, unified brand-name spelling and capitalization guidelines across patient materials.
rules.rule_text: Always write the brand name as 'LISRAYA' in ALL CAPS in all patient-facing materials, superseding any general guides recommending title-case.

quotes: registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib)
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`

Include the **® registered trademark symbol only when the generic name is included** — i.e., LISRAYA® (brepocitinib). Apply on **first/most prominent mention only**, in **external-facing documents only**. Do not repeat ® on subsequent mentions.
Generic name format: lowercase, in parentheses: `(brepocitinib)`.

rules.intent: Maintain accurate legal and medical definitions of the drug during first reference without cluttered repetition.
rules.rule_text: The registered trademark symbol ® must only be used on the first or most prominent mention of the brand name in external-facing materials, and only when paired with the generic name formatted in lowercase and parentheses as 'LISRAYA® (brepocitinib)'. Subsequent mentions must not repeat the trademark symbol.

quotes: sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections
Parent company: Priovant Therapeutics, Inc. (sign-off lives in the locked footer — do not add it in sections).

rules.intent: Prevent legal sign-off and footer redundancy in body text.
rules.rule_text: Do not manually add the parent company name 'Priovant Therapeutics, Inc.' in content sections; it is restricted to the locked footer (end_matter).
